metadata.description: RavenClaude — a private marketplace of opinionated Claude Code plugins. Ships ravenclaude-core (Team Lead + 14 specialists pattern with active Structured Output Protocol + Cited-Adjudicator Escalation) and power-platform (11 Microsoft Power Platform specialists + bundled pbix-mcp) today; finance, EdTech, regulatory-compliance, and web-design plugins planned.

plugins.name: ravenclaude-core
plugins.description: Domain-neutral Claude Code plugin: 14 specialist agents (architect, coders, reviewers, designer, documentarian, deep-researcher, project-manager, partner-success-manager, prompt-engineer, data-engineer, etc.), team-lead dispatch playbook with cross-plugin dispatch section, format/lint/test gates, contribution-staging workflow (with security sweep + expert-routing gates), templates for memos/runbooks/design specs/RAID logs/partner-success, plugin-distributable hooks (auto-activate in consumer projects) including the new guard-recursive-spawn advisory, layout-enforcement hook + CI workflow, and a /init-agent-ready slash command that steers consumer repos toward the same agent-readable boundary files (AGENTS.md + CLAUDE.md + .repo-layout.json).

plugins.name: power-platform
plugins.description: Microsoft Power Platform specialist team — 11 specialists including the new power-platform-tester (Test Studio, flow run-history, DAX semantic correctness, pac solution check) and power-bi-engineer (semantic models, DAX, PBIP git + Azure DevOps integration) alongside canvas/Power Fx, Power Automate + custom connectors, Dataverse modeling/security, model-driven apps, pac CLI + ALM, tenant governance/DLP, PCF, Copilot Studio + AI Builder, Power Pages. House-opinions hook now covers 8 mechanically-detectable §3/§4 violations (GUIDs, default prefix, hard-coded URLs, binary .pbix, missing flow Try/Catch, premium-connector licensing notes, Power Fx var/col prefixes, plaintext secrets in env-var defaults). Bundles the community pbix-mcp server (d0nk3yhm/pbix-mcp, MIT) for Power BI .pbix/.pbit read/write/DAX-eval without Power BI Desktop (requires `pip install pbix-mcp`).
